arts.ttl: Post Match Observations: Dortmund Beat Barcelona in Strong 3-1 Performance
arts.sum: After the own goal, the team looked understandably deflated—that was until Julien Duranville produced a moment of magic, going past two defenders and crossing the ball into the box. Across the line, the team played very well, and even Bensebaini had a good game if we forget about the own goal.

arts.ttl: ‘There wasn’t much euphoria’ - Flick reveals what he told Barca players after Dortmund defeat
arts.sum: Hansi Flick admitted he had to remind his Barcelona players they had reached the semi-finals of the Champions League after Tuesday’s defeat to Dortmund . I think we’ve deservedly reached the semi-finals,” he told reporters.

arts.ttl: Barça should have cruised by Dortmund, instead they nearly crumbled
arts.sum: Flashbacks of past capitulations against Roma and Liverpool were fresh in the mind as Barcelona nearly contrived to give up a four-goal lead on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Warning signs are blaring for Barca in the Champions League and beyond
arts.sum: Against the remaining competition in the Champions League, Barcelona will not only lose if they play this way, they will embarrass themselves. So when Lamine refuses to press, or track back, or give anything offensively, it’s Kounde, and the backline who plays in a high line writ large, who he’s hurting the most.

arts.ttl: Flick has to remind glum Barça: We're in semis
arts.sum: Barcelona coach Hansi Flick said he had to remind his disappointed players they had reached the Champions League semifinal after Tuesday's 3-1 loss to Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Serhou Guirassy hat-trick in vain as Barcelona reach Champions League semi-finals despite Dortmund defeat
arts.sum: LaLiga leaders prevail despite suffering first loss of 2025 in any competition in Germany

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund star BREAKS Mohamed Salah's Champions League record - but his hat-trick is in vain as Barcelona survive to reach semi-finals
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund faced a tricky task from the start given the Catalan giants held a 4-0 aggregate lead from last week's first leg following a dominant performance.

arts.ttl: Araujo admits Dortmund tie ‘could have slipped away’ from Barca
arts.sum: Barcelona defender Ronald Araujo is happy to be in the semi-finals of the Champions League but admits the tie with Dortmund could have slipped away from his side. “I personally had never played in the semifinals, so I’m happy because we’re doing well.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick reveals downcast Barcelona emotions despite Champions League progression
arts.sum: Barcelona did not have it easy against Borussia Dortmund, but they did enough to book their place in the Champions League semi-finals. They were defeated 3-1 in their quarter-final second leg on Tuesday, but in the end, they progressed 5-3 on aggregate. Dortmund were on top throughout the 90 minutes at the Signal Iduma Park, […] The post Hansi Flick reveals downcast Barcelona emotions despite Champions League progression appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: "We are out because of the away game" - Groß pins BVB elimination on first-leg disaster
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund's 33-year-old midfielder reacted to his side's performance tonight.
